end return(function(K,T,L,R,y,g,Z,W,r,k,u,q,t,B,n,F,x,V,f,P,J,p,i)q,t,r,p,P,n,J,V,f,F,B,k,i,x,u,W={},function()F=F+(516593-516592)q[F]=-524943-(-524944)return F end,function(K,d)local T=x(d)local L=function(L)return V(K,{L},d,T)end return L end,function(V,L,R,y)local
